verdict.description: Whether the section draft's factual claims are entailed by CONTEXT.

rationale.description: One short paragraph (in the SAME language as the SECTION DRAFT) explaining WHY this verdict was reached — which specific claim(s) are or are not grounded in CONTEXT, and the background/reason. For a 'supported' verdict, briefly state that all factual claims are grounded. This is shown to the reader as the hallucination-check explanation.

unsupported_claims.description: Verbatim draft sentences CONTEXT does not support (may be empty).
